title: ProbablyBackpacks
body:
# ✦ Probably Backpacks ✦ ### Tiered Backpack System with Upgrades for Spigot & Paper [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-2.2-blueviolet?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/probablybackpacks) [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/minecraft-1.14%20—%201.21+-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAyNCAyNCI+PHBhdGggZmlsbD0id2hpdGUiIGQ9Ik0xMiAyQzYuNSAyIDIgNi41IDIgMTJzNC41IDEwIDEwIDEwIDEwLTQuNSAxMC0xMFMxNy41IDIgMTIgMnoiLz48L3N2Zz4=)](https://www.spigotmc.org/) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1456137607569346739?label=Discord&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/r5YXqgrGya) [![bStats](https://img.shields.io/badge/bStats-live-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Probably%20Backpacks/29881) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support%20Me-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/brothergaming52) **Leather · Copper · Iron · Gold · Diamond · Netherite**
Custom Textures · Upgradeable · 3D Models · CuriosPaper Addon --- *Think of it as **Sophisticated Backpacks** — but for Paper & Spigot, with 3D models, rich upgrades, and a seamless accessory integration.*
--- ## ✦ What is Probably Backpacks? ✦ Probably Backpacks adds a complete **tiered backpack system** to your Minecraft server. Players craft backpacks from Leather all the way up to Netherite — each tier offering **more storage** and **more upgrade slots**. Backpacks are equipped in the CuriosPaper **Back slot** and are visible on the player's back as a 3D model! This plugin is a **CuriosPaper addon**, hooking into the accessory system to provide a seamless experience with custom textures, real-time dyeing, and a powerful upgrade system. > [!IMPORTANT] > This plugin requires **[CuriosPaper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/curiospaper)** to function! --- ## ✦ Features ✦ ### 🎒 Core Backpack System | | Feature | Description | |:---:|---|---| | 🎒 | **6 Backpack Tiers** | Leather → Copper → Iron → Gold → Diamond → Netherite | | 📦 | **27 to 120 Slots** | Scale from a small pouch to a massive storage vault | | ⬆️ | **19+ Upgrades** | Crafting, Magnet, Cooking, Anvil, Jukebox, Tool Swapper & more | | 🎨 | **Real-time Dyeing** | Over 16 colors with live 3D model updates | | 🧟 | **Mob Drops** | Mobs can spawn wearing backpacks — loot them for extra storage | | 👀 | **3D Models** | Visible on the player's back with auto-hide when looking down | | 🔑 | **Hotkey Support** | Open your backpack with a double-sneak combo — no commands needed | | 🗄️ | **Massive Stacks** | Stack items up to 1024 with Netherite Stack Upgrades | --- ## ✦ Backpack Tiers ✦ | Tier | Slots | Upgrade Slots | Key Material | |:---|:---:|:---:|:---| | 🟤 **Leather Backpack** | 27 | 1 | Leather + String + Chest | | 🟠 **Copper Backpack** | 45 | 2 | Copper Ingots + Leather Backpack | | ⚪ **Iron Backpack** | 54 | 3 | Iron Ingots + Copper Backpack | | 🟡 **Gold Backpack** | 81 | 4 | Gold Ingots + Iron Backpack | | 🔵 **Diamond Backpack** | 108 | 5 | Diamonds + Gold Backpack | | 🟣 **Netherite Backpack** | 120 | 6 | Smithing Table + Netherite Ingot | *Each tier requires the **previous backpack** as an ingredient — creating a natural progression chain!* --- ## ✦ Upgrades ✦ Upgrades are placed into the backpack's **upgrade slots** to grant powerful abilities: ### 🛠️ Utility Upgrades | Upgrade | Effect | |:---|:---| | 🔧 **Crafting Station** | Open a portable crafting table from within your backpack | | 🔨 **Anvil Upgrade** | Portable anvil for repairing items on the go | | 🎵 **Jukebox Upgrade** | Play music discs directly from your backpack | | 🛠️ **Smithing Upgrade** | Portable smithing table for gear progression | | ⚔️ **Tool Swapper** | Automatically swaps to the best tool for the block you're mining | ### 🧺 Automation Upgrades | Upgrade | Effect | |:---|:---| | 📥 **Pickup Upgrade** | Automatically collect picked-up items into your backpack | | 🧲 **Magnet Upgrade** | Pull nearby items directly into your backpack | | 🍖 **Feeding Upgrade** | Auto-feed the player using food stored in the backpack | | 🔄 **Refill Upgrade** | Auto-refill hotbar items from the backpack as they are used | | 📦 **Compacting Upgrade** | Automatically compress items into blocks (e.g. Iron Ingots → Iron Block) | ### 🍳 Cooking Upgrades | Upgrade | Effect | |:---|:---| | 🔥 **Smelting Upgrade** | Portable furnace that smelts items while you walk | | 💨 **Blasting Upgrade** | High-speed smelting for ores | | 🍖 **Smoker Upgrade** | Rapid cooking for food items | ### 🗄️ Storage Upgrades | Upgrade | Effect | |:---|:---| | 🛠️ **Upgrade Base** | The fundamental component used to craft all other upgrades | | 🟠 **Copper Stack** | Increases max stack size of items in the backpack to 96 | | ⚪ **Iron Stack** | Increases max stack size of items in the backpack to 128 | | 🟡 **Gold Stack** | Increases max stack size of items in the backpack to 256 | | 🔵 **Diamond Stack** | Increases max stack size of items in the backpack to 512 | | 🟣 **Netherite Stack** | Increases max stack size of items in the backpack to 1024 | --- ## ✦ Dyeing & Mobs ✦ ### 🎨 Dyeing System Express yourself with over **16 unique colors**! Leather backpacks can be dyed directly within the backpack inventory. - **Simple Dyeing**: No complex GUIs! Simply **drop any Minecraft dye** onto the dye button in the backpack interface. - **Remove Color**: Use a **Water Bucket** on the dye button to clear the color. - **Live Updates**: The 3D model on your back updates instantly when you change the color. ### 🧟 Mob Drops Backpacks aren't just for players anymore! Zombies and Skeletons have a small chance to spawn wearing a backpack. - **Visual Models**: You can see exactly which tier of backpack a mob is wearing. - **Lootable**: Defeat the mob for a chance to collect their backpack! - **Configurable**: Adjust spawn rates and which tiers mobs can carry in the `config.yml`. --- ## ✦ Recipes ✦
🎒 Backpack Recipes (click to expand)
### 🟤 Leather Backpack **Slots:** 27 · **Upgrade Slots:** 1 The starting tier backpack. Requires basic materials to craft. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | String | Leather | String | | String | Chest | String | | Leather | Leather | Leather |
### 🟠 Copper Backpack **Slots:** 45 · **Upgrade Slots:** 2 An upgrade from leather — requires copper ingots and a Leather Backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Copper Ingot | Copper Ingot | Copper Ingot | | Copper Ingot | 🟤 Leather Backpack | Copper Ingot | | Copper Ingot | Copper Ingot | Copper Ingot |
### ⚪ Iron Backpack **Slots:** 54 · **Upgrade Slots:** 3 Solid mid-tier storage. Requires iron ingots and a Copper Backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot | | Iron Ingot | 🟠 Copper Backpack | Iron Ingot | | Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot | Iron Ingot |
### 🟡 Gold Backpack **Slots:** 81 · **Upgrade Slots:** 4 High-capacity storage with plenty of room for upgrades. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | | Gold Ingot | ⚪ Iron Backpack | Gold Ingot | | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot |
### 🔵 Diamond Backpack **Slots:** 108 · **Upgrade Slots:** 5 Premium-tier storage. Only one step away from the ultimate backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Diamond | Diamond | Diamond | | Diamond | 🟡 Gold Backpack | Diamond | | Diamond | Diamond | Diamond |
### 🟣 Netherite Backpack **Slots:** 120 · **Upgrade Slots:** 6 The ultimate backpack. Crafted at a **Smithing Table** using the Netherite Upgrade template. | Component | Item | |:---|:---| | **Template** | Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template | | **Base** | 🔵 Diamond Backpack | | **Addition** | Netherite Ingot |
---
⬆️ Upgrade Recipes (click to expand)
### 🛠️ Upgrade Base The fundamental component for crafting most upgrades. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | String | Iron Ingot | String | | Iron Ingot | Leather | Iron Ingot | | String | Iron Ingot | String |
### 🔧 Crafting Station Adds a **portable crafting table** to your backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Oak Planks | Crafting Table | Oak Planks | | Oak Planks | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Oak Planks | | Oak Planks | Crafting Table | Oak Planks |
### 📥 Pickup Upgrade **Auto-collects** picked-up items into the backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | | Piston | | | String | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | String | | Redstone | Redstone | Redstone |
### 🧲 Magnet Upgrade **Pulls nearby items** directly into your backpack. Requires the Pickup Upgrade. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Ender Pearl | Iron Ingot | Ender Pearl | | Iron Ingot | 📥 Pickup Upgrade | Iron Ingot | | Redstone | Diamond | Lapis Lazuli |
### 🍖 Feeding Upgrade **Auto-feeds** the player using food stored in the backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | | Golden Carrot | | | Golden Apple | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Glistering Melon Slice | | | Ender Pearl | |
### 🔄 Refill Upgrade **Auto-refills** hotbar items from the backpack as they deplete. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | | Ender Pearl | | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | Redstone | Chest | Redstone |
### 📦 Compacting Upgrade **Auto-compresses** items into their block forms. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Iron Ingot | Piston | Iron Ingot | | Piston | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Piston | | Redstone | Piston | Redstone |
### ⚔️ Tool Swapper **Auto-swaps** to the best tool for the block you are mining. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Redstone | Wood Sword | Redstone | | Wood Pick | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Wood Axe | | Iron Ingot | Wood Shovel | Iron Ingot |
### 🔨 Anvil Upgrade Adds a **portable anvil** to your backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Anvil | Diamond | Anvil | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | | Chest | |
### 🎵 Jukebox Upgrade **Play music discs** directly from your backpack's GUI. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | | Jukebox | | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | | Redstone | |
### 🛠️ Smithing Upgrade A portable **Smithing Table** for your backpack. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | | Smithing Table | | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | | Chest | |
### 🔥 Smelting Upgrade **Smelts items** automatically while you travel. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Redstone | Iron Ingot | Redstone | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | Redstone | Furnace | Redstone |
### 💨 Blasting Upgrade **High-speed smelting** for ores and materials. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Redstone | Iron Ingot | Redstone | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | Redstone | Blast Furnace | Redstone |
### 🍖 Smoker Upgrade **Rapidly cooks food** items while you're on the move. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Redstone | Iron Ingot | Redstone | | Iron Ingot | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Iron Ingot | | Redstone | Smoker | Redstone |
### 🟠 Copper Stack Upgrade **Increases** max stack size in the backpack to **96**. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Copper Block | Copper Block | Copper Block | | Copper Block | 🛠️ Upgrade Base | Copper Block | | Copper Block | Copper Block | Copper Block |
### ⚪ Iron Stack Upgrade **Increases** max stack size in the backpack to **128**. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Iron Block | Iron Block | Iron Block | | Iron Block | 🟠 Copper Stack Upgrade | Iron Block | | Iron Block | Iron Block | Iron Block |
### 🟡 Gold Stack Upgrade **Increases** max stack size in the backpack to **256**. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Gold Block | Gold Block | Gold Block | | Gold Block | ⚪ Iron Stack Upgrade | Gold Block | | Gold Block | Gold Block | Gold Block |
### 🔵 Diamond Stack Upgrade **Increases** max stack size in the backpack to **512**. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Diamond Block | Diamond Block | Diamond Block | | Diamond Block | 🟡 Gold Stack Upgrade | Diamond Block | | Diamond Block | Diamond Block | Diamond Block |
### 🟣 Netherite Stack Upgrade **Increases** max stack size in the backpack to **1024**. | | | | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | Netherite Block | Netherite Block | Netherite Block | | Netherite Block | 🔵 Diamond Stack Upgrade | Netherite Block | | Netherite Block | Netherite Block | Netherite Block |
--- ## ✦ Stats & Support ✦

### Join the Discord! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1456137607569346739?label=Discord&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/r5YXqgrGya) **[discord.gg/r5YXqgrGya](https://discord.gg/r5YXqgrGya)** Get help · Report bugs · Suggest features · Stay updated
--- ## ✦ Quick Start ✦ 1. Download **CuriosPaper.jar** and **ProbablyBackpacks.jar** 2. Drop both into your server's `plugins/` folder 3. Restart the server 4. Craft a **Leather Backpack** and equip it in the CuriosPaper **Back slot** 5. Use the **Double-Sneak hotkey** — you're all set! ---
**Made with ❤️ by Brothergaming52** [Discord](https://discord.gg/r5YXqgrGya) · [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/brothergaming52) · [bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/ProbablyBackpacks/29881) · [CuriosPaper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/curiospaper)
